items.title:
This student got flagged at 89% AI by Turnitin and faced EXPULSION 😭
They only had 48hrs to prove they wrote it themselves…
Here's the tool that saved them (and it's genius) 🧵👇

#turnitin #aidetection #aitools #plagiarism #students
